description: Your WordPress site is receiving automated pingback spam on older articles. The previous administrator tried to stop this but failed because changing global settings doesn't affect existing posts. Secure the site's discussion settings by disabling pingbacks and trackbacks on new posts, automatically closing comments on posts older than 30 days, and holding comments in the queue if they contain 1 or more links. Retroactively update all published posts to disallow pings. Clean the moderation queue by removing all pending pingback spam while ensuring the legitimate comment from 'Jane Doe' remains intact. You are logged into the WordPress admin dashboard in Firefox.
